title: Simplified x Fresh Animations
description: Addon that brings Fresh Animations to Simplified
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/984b6ffc714b94683bc073a1b7c3b34f9d4559fb.png)

!! NOT UPDATED FOR  VERSION 26.1 !!

Disclaimer: You will need to install [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) to take full advantage of this add-on.

![Charged Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fY45VoaR/images/55c4acfa67ec75796cd8e16533b036ffe05ac1d7.jpeg)

![Sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fY45VoaR/images/22dc45b3003f3fb1e869f0f645848bb69c0700bc.jpeg)

**Install guide:**
1. Download [Simplified](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jeelh-simplified)
2. Download [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
3. Download Simplified x FA
4. Install the packs in this order

![Load Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c19267980434e24629e33bf2c2111d920397a52b.png)
